rituals.name: Protocol Alpha – The Invisibility Cloak
rituals.description: A deep-silence full-body massage engineered for guests who demand total sensory isolation. Zero conversation, zero eye contact. Pure calibrated pressure.

rituals.name: Protocol Sigma – Deep Cover
rituals.description: A private hamam ritual performed in the secure wing. Black marble, obsidian scrub, and single-use linens. Discretion guaranteed. No footage. No records.

rituals.name: Protocol Omega – Zero Trace
rituals.description: Neurosensory aromatherapy fused with cold-press muscle recovery. Engineered to restore peak cognitive and physical performance within 60 minutes. No residue. No trace.

rituals.name: John Wick Special – The Continental Package
rituals.description: Full evening exclusive. Private hamam + Protocol Alpha massage + Omega recovery + secure lounge access. Gold coin pricing applies. By invitation only.
